home.title: TRCX Soluções
home.subtitle: Wesley Xavier's technical portfolio — software engineering and systems architecture.

about.heading: Tailor-made digital solutions.
paragraphs: I'm a software developer committed to turning ideas into unique and effective digital solutions.
Working independently, I deliver personalized services ranging from web platforms to tailor-made systems.

With a focus on quality and innovation, I use cutting-edge technologies to meet client needs swiftly and efficiently. My edge lies in personalized attention and the flexibility to work side by side with clients, ensuring that every solution delivered aligns perfectly with each project's specific goals and challenges.
I live in Cotia, São Paulo, with my wife and two daughters — family is what gives purpose to the technical work.
